content:
#!/bin/bash
# Train CLIP model with moderate augmentation
torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 train_weighted.py \
    --epochs 12 \
    --batch_size 64 \
    --lr 1e-4 \
    --backbone_lr 1e-5 \
    --weight_decay 0.05 \
    --model_type clip \
    --sketch_aug_prob 0.25 \
    --grayscale_prob 0.40 \
    --drop_rate 0.1 \
    --label_smoothing 0.1 \
    --save_path checkpoints/clip_v2.pt

echo '=== CLIP training done, starting DINOv2 ==='

# Train DINOv2 model
torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 train_weighted.py \
    --epochs 12 \
    --batch_size 64 \
    --lr 2e-4 \
    --backbone_lr 2e-5 \
    --weight_decay 0.05 \
    --model_type dinov2 \
    --sketch_aug_prob 0.25 \
    --grayscale_prob 0.40 \
    --drop_rate 0.1 \
    --label_smoothing 0.1 \
    --save_path checkpoints/dinov2_best.pt
